severity_values.meaning: Blocking uncertainty or missing decision evidence

checks.purpose: Required controlled file exists at the declared in-boundary path
Drawing register, metadata, and revision history agree on current revision
Required equipment tags resolve on declared drawings
Authoritative BOM quantity agrees with declared package quantity metadata
Required equipment resolves to the authoritative datasheet
Identifier normalization is safe and unambiguous
Review-routed drawing titles agree after display normalization

matching_rule: Expected findings match exact check ID and version, state, severity, release hold, affected identifiers, authority rule, values or condition, and evidence locators. Wildcards are prohibited.
